allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from langchain_community.document_loaders import PyPDFLoader, TextLoader; print\('PyPDFLoader and TextLoader available from langchain_community'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m scripts.ask "What is the remote work policy?")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m scripts.ask "What is the password policy and minimum length requirement?")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m scripts.ask "What is the capital of Mars?")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m scripts.ask --mode graph "What are the vendor payment terms and SLA requirements?")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m scripts.ask --filter department=finance "What was the Q1 2026 total revenue?")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m scripts.ask --mode graph "What is the recipe for chocolate cake?")
